title: The Realism Pack
description: Enjoy Minecraft with dozens of realism mods and quality of life mods. The best Minecraft out there...
body:
# The Realism Pack
The best Minecraft experience as a simple modpack. Has over 70+ mods that include Quality Of Life, Realism and optimization mods.

## Key Features:
- Custom World Generation. Uses Terralith and Tectonic to generate beautiful worlds.
- Satisfying experience when using inventory, exploring world and many more...
- Comes with Simple Voice Chat and Essential Mod that make playing even better.
- Everything comes already configured. No need to mess with the settings and so on.
- Bunch of Quality Of Life mods to make Minecraft a bit less frustrating.
- Almost 90% of the mods are client side, so go on and play on servers if you want.
- A lot of optimization mods to keep that fps high.
- Updated regularly
